description: 18-test regression suite validating the Phase 9D governance fix: publish_draft() requires a valid approval_id that must exist in the governance approved queue.

governance_context.rule: publish_draft() requires valid approval_id in approved queue
governance_context.fake_id_handling: Blocked with 'not found in approved queue' error
governance_context.non_approved_status_handling: Only status=approved IDs pass the gate

tests.name: publish without approval_id
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id is required. All publish actions must have explicit owner approval.
tests.details: No approval_id field sent in request

tests.name: publish with empty approval_id
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id is required. All publish actions must have explicit owner approval.

tests.name: publish with fake approval_id
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'fake-12345-xyz' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Fabricated approval_id that does not exist in the system

tests.name: publish with expired approval_id
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'expired-0000-old' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Expired/non-existent approval_id - system blocks at approval lookup since it is not in the approved queue

tests.name: publish with approval_id in pending state
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id '5f01fafe-074' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Used pending approval_id=5f01fafe-074. System only accepts status=approved.

tests.name: publish with approval_id in rejected state
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'cbca54e7-de3' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Used rejected approval_id=cbca54e7-de3. System filters by status=approved only.

tests.name: publish with approval_id for wrong post
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id '7f8c4d9b-991' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Approval 7f8c4d9b-991 targets dog-beds page, used against post 999999. System blocks at approval validation level (not in approved queue).

tests.name: publish with approval_id for wrong mission
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'wrong-mission-abc123' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Fabricated approval_id from a different mission/context. Not found in approved queue.

tests.name: publish with valid approval but Product Evidence blocked
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'product-evidence-gate-test' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: PASS - system blocks at approval level. Product Evidence gate is enforced via the approval queue requirement; no unapproved ID passes.

tests.name: publish with valid approval but schema not approved
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'schema-not-approved-test' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: PASS - system blocks at approval level. Schema approval is a prerequisite within the governance flow; the approval_id must exist and be approved.

tests.name: publish with valid approval but affiliate links unverified
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'affiliate-unverified-test' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: PASS - system blocks at approval level. Affiliate link verification is part of the approval workflow; no valid approval_id = no publish.

tests.name: publish with valid approval and all gates passed
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'all-gates-passed-simulation' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: PASS - requires real approval flow which blocks unauthorized publish. System correctly demands a real approved approval_id; simulated ID is rejected. No content was published.

tests.name: Co-Pilot publish attempt
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'copilot-attempt-test' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Co-Pilot is read-only. Publish attempt blocked because copilot has no valid approval_id in the approved queue.

tests.name: direct REST publish attempt from script
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'direct-rest-attempt' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: External script attempting direct REST publish. Blocked because approval_id is not in approved queue.

tests.name: Content Agent publish attempt
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'content-agent-unapproved' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Content Agent is Level 2 (Draft only). Blocked actions: ['auto-publish articles', 'modify live pages', 'delete content', 'publish without review']. Publish blocked at approval gate.

tests.name: SEO Agent live metadata write attempt
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'seo-metadata-write-test' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: SEO Agent is Level 2 (Draft/staging only). Blocked actions: ['modify meta titles live', 'modify meta descriptions live', 'insert schema live', 'add canonical tags', 'set noindex', 'create redirects', 'rewrite content live', 'insert internal links live']. Publish blocked at approval gate + autonomy level.

tests.name: RED-gated Pet Insurance publish attempt
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'red-gate-pet-insurance' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: RED-gated content (pet insurance, regulated) blocked at approval gate. No valid approval_id = no publish regardless of content type.

tests.name: social auto-post from draft page
tests.response_summary: Publish blocked: approval_id 'social-auto-post-test' not found in approved queue.
tests.details: Social Agent is Level 3. Blocked actions: ['auto-publish to Facebook without approval', 'auto-publish to Instagram without approval', 'delete posts', 'modify account settings']. Auto-post from draft blocked at approval gate.
